nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Great Inca finch
nodes.summary: Great Inca finch（Incaspiza pulchra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Great Inca finch。

nodes.name: Great Inca finch
nodes.summary: The great Inca finch (Incaspiza pulchra) is a species of passerine bird in the tanager family Thraupidae. It was traditionally placed in the family Emberizidae. It is endemic to Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
